mapper.select: SELECT NVL(A.MAX_SAIRYOU_ALLO,10) - NVL(A.SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT,0) - NVL(G.OLD_SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT,0) AS MAYBE_SAIRYOU_COUNT, NVL(A.SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT,0) AS SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT, NVL(G.OLD_SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT,0) AS OLD_SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT, G.OLD_BRANCH_NO, G.OLD_ACCOUNT_NO, NVL(A.MAX_SAIRYOU_ALLO,10) AS MAX_SAIRYOU_ALLO FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO MUAI LEFT JOIN ETINTRA.IPO_COUNT_MASTER A ON MUAI.BUTEN_CODE = SUBSTR(A.BRANCH_NO,1,3) AND MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(A.ACCOUNT_NO) AND TO_CHAR(A.ANNUAL,'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY') - CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'MM') < '04' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END LEFT JOIN ( SELECT E.BUTEN_CODE AS BUTEN_CODE, E.ACCOUNT_NUMBER AS ACCOUNT_NUMBER, NVL(F.SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT,0) AS OLD_SAIRYOU_ALLO_COUNT, E.OLD_BRANCH_NO, E.OLD_ACCOUNT_NO FROM ( SELECT C.BUTEN_CODE, C.ACCOUNT_NUMBER, D.OLD_BRANCH_NO, D.OLD_ACCOUNT_NO FROM MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO C INNER JOIN CALLCENTER.CHANGE_ACCOUNT D ON C.BUTEN_CODE = SUBSTR(D.NEW_BRANCH_NO,1,3) AND C.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(D.NEW_ACCOUNT_NO) WHERE C.BUTEN_CODE = #{butenCode} AND C.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{accountNumber}) ) E LEFT JOIN ETINTRA.IPO_COUNT_MASTER F ON E.OLD_BRANCH_NO = F.BRANCH_NO AND E.OLD_ACCOUNT_NO = F.ACCOUNT_NO AND TO_CHAR(F.ANNUAL,'YYYY') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYY') - CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'MM') < '04' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) G ON MUAI.BUTEN_CODE = G.BUTEN_CODE AND MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = G.ACCOUNT_NUMBER WHERE MUAI.BUTEN_CODE = #{butenCode} AND MUAI.ACCOUNT_NUMBER = TO_NUMBER(#{accountNumber})

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ETINTRA.BB_PRODUCT_MASTER A INNER JOIN ETINTRA.SR_ACCEPT B ON A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = B.BB_PRODUCT_CODE AND TO_CHAR(A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM,'YYYYMMDD') = TO_CHAR(B.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM) AND B.BB_BRANCH_CODE = RPAD(#{butenCode}, 4, ' ') AND B.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER = LPAD(#{accountNumber}, 7, 0) WHERE A.BB_LOT = '0' AND A.BB_IPO_PO_KBN = '1'
AND A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE <> #{brandCode}
